prediction_ref.short_label: 1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization (led by Bonsai, Qwen/Llama 1-bit derivatives to follow)

validation_rows.evidence_summary: Bonsai-8B MLX 1-bit continues to circulate (Apple Silicon MLX runtime hosts 8B-class performance in 1.15 GB on M2 / M3 / M4) and The Register's PrismML stealth-exit framing keeps 1-bit-native economics in view, but no new lab ships a 1-bit-from-scratch checkpoint and no Qwen or Llama 1-bit derivative surfaces inside the Apr 22-24 window.

The Register - PrismML debuts 1-bit LLM

bridge.narrative: Bonsai-8B MLX 1-bit's continued Apple Silicon distribution at 1.15 GB across M2 / M3 / M4 keeps the precondition observation alive, while The Register's framing of 1-bit-native as a path to free AI from cloud dependence reinforces the underlying economics; no new lab ships a 1-bit-from-scratch checkpoint or Qwen / Llama 1-bit derivative inside the window.
bridge.remaining_gap: Need a second lab to ship a 1-bit-from-scratch checkpoint or a Qwen / Llama 1-bit fork to confirm the trend.

prediction_ref.short_label: Convergence on an "Agent Registry" model (registry standard for distributing skills, tool permissions, audit traces)

validation_rows.evidence_summary: AWS Bedrock AgentCore's Managed Harness detail (Apr 23) pins down a 3-API-call agent runtime + filesystem persistence + AgentCore CLI + pre-built coding skills across 4 preview regions; Okta's GA-on-Apr-30 launch of Okta for AI Agents registers agents as first-class identities with continuous discovery + SIEM forwarding + universal logout; Keycard's control plane (out of stealth Oct 2025, Anchor.dev / Runebook acquisitions, Smallstep partnership) ships task-scoped revocable tokens, but no shared cross-vendor skill / permission / audit-trace artifact format yet emerges.

bridge.remaining_gap: Need a multi-vendor artifact spec for skills, tool permissions, and audit traces interoperating across AWS, Okta, Keycard, and Google surfaces.

prediction_ref.short_label: Indirect prompt injection becomes a top CVE category (CVSS 8.0+ regulars by Q3 2026)

validation_rows.evidence_summary: Infosecurity Magazine surfaces 10 in-the-wild indirect prompt-injection attacks breaking crawlers / RAG / HTML-comment processing through web-content poisoning; the Cloud Security Alliance writeup of Google Antigravity's Pattern-parameter prompt injection chains into RCE even in restrictive mode; Capsule Security details Microsoft Copilot Studio CVE-2026-21520 (CVSS 7.5) plus the Salesforce Agentforce PipeLeak equivalent — three concurrent indirect-injection-driven attack reports in the window.

bridge.remaining_gap: Need a confirmed Patch Tuesday rollup explicitly naming an LLM-integration CVE at CVSS 8.0+ within the next month or two to lock in the cadence.

prediction_ref.short_label: Acceleration of "local > cloud" inversion (by Q3 2026, individual / SMB coding agents standardize on local-default)

validation_rows.evidence_summary: DeepSeek V4-Pro / V4-Flash drop together as open weights on Hugging Face with native 1M context (Hybrid Attention cuts 1M-context FLOPs to 27% of V3.2, KV cache to 10%) and Simon Willison frames the package as frontier-adjacent at a fraction of the price; AIBase confirms Qwen3.6-27B's 1M long-context Claude-Code-grade coding ability is now downloadable; Ollama v0.21.2 bundles OpenClaw + web-search plugins across macOS / Linux / Windows, materially lowering the local-default switching cost.

bridge.remaining_gap: Need a major IDE or coding-agent vendor to ship a local-default config flag that flips the runtime selection without manual setup.

prediction_ref.short_label: Secret leakage through CI / agents becomes the next battleground ("Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration" rises to OWASP top)

validation_rows.evidence_summary: Proofpoint connects the Mercor leak (4TB / candidate profiles / interview recordings / facial biometrics / API keys / employer data leaked via TeamPCP through LiteLLM CI/CD) to the Anthropic Mythos Preview unauthorized access, framing it as enterprise AI security risk; Exabeam Agent Behavior Analytics extends to Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit + Agent Gateway covering all 10 OWASP Agentic Top 10 categories and earns 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year for Security: Analytics & Operations; Exabeam's earlier Apr 1 ABA expansion across ChatGPT / Copilot / Gemini formalizes an AI Insider Threat category — three concurrent agent-credential exfil signals.

bridge.remaining_gap: Need an explicit CIS or OWASP top-list entry naming Agent-in-the-Loop Secret Exfiltration as a category, not only vendor-side detection coverage.

prediction_ref.short_label: "Headless Everything" architecture standardizes (headless-preferred metadata on MCP / Agent Registry)

bridge.narrative: Google Cloud Next '26 Day 3 leans into headless cross-system integrations (Agentic Data Cloud + Agentic Defense + Workspace Skills + Meet's automated minutes) without surfacing a registry-side headless-preferred metadata field, leaving the registry layer of the prediction neither supported nor refuted while the surrounding direction continues.
bridge.remaining_gap: Need a concrete MCP or agent-registry server metadata field carrying headless-preferred semantics.

prediction_ref.short_label: The era of "exclusive alliance between hyperscaler and frontier lab" (5-pole regime)

validation_rows.evidence_summary: OpenAI GPT-5.5 + GPT-5.5 Pro launch running on NVIDIA GB200 NVL72 racks confirms the OpenAI-MS-NVIDIA codesigned-exclusive shape; Anthropic's Q1 2026 annualized revenue clears $30B (above OpenAI's $25B), underwritten by multi-vendor compute contracts (TPU / Broadcom / Google Cloud) on top of the AWS Trainium commit; Project Glasswing's 40+-org launch list (AWS / Apple / Broadcom / Cisco / CrowdStrike / Google / JPMorganChase / Linux Foundation / Microsoft / NVIDIA / Palo Alto Networks) crystallizes the codesigned-exclusive-with-hyperscaler shape.

prediction_ref.short_label: Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split

validation_rows.evidence_summary: DeepSeek V4-Pro / V4-Flash ship as open weights on Hugging Face with self-rated 3-6-month gap to GPT-5.4 / Gemini 3.1-Pro, Tencent Hunyuan Hy3 Preview joins the Chinese AI labs' open-weight frontier the same week, and OpenAI GPT-5.5 + Anthropic Mythos staged-gating remain proprietary / API-only with API priced 2x GPT-5.4 — both halves of the structural split crystallize together.
